title: juglans regia lusus heterophylla
intro: Juglans regia lusus heterophylla, also known as the English walnut tree, is a variant of the common walnut tree (Juglans regia) characterized by its unique leaf morphology. This deciduous tree has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The English walnut tree's extract has been used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Juglans regia lusus heterophylla may include walnut hulls, leaves, and bark, which can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal use.
